prompt_en: Say: The court order is usually executed by the police.
expected_es: La orden judicial suele ser ejecutada por la policía.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form ('es'), natural construction, agreement ('ejecutada'), preposition ('por'), and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: Use 'ser' for passive voice, and ensure the past participle agrees with the subject in gender and number.

prompt_en: Say: The biopsy was performed by a specialized medical team yesterday.
expected_es: La biopsia fue realizada por un equipo médico especializado ayer.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form ('fue'), natural construction, agreement ('realizada'), preposition ('por'), and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: Use 'ser' in the preterite for a completed passive action, ensuring participle agreement.

prompt_en: Say: The traceability of all components will be guaranteed by our new system.
expected_es: La trazabilidad de todos los componentes será garantizada por nuestro nuevo sistema.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form ('será'), natural construction, agreement ('garantizada'), preposition ('por'), and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: For passive voice in the future, use 'será' and ensure the past participle agrees with the subject.

prompt_en: Say: The currency exchange has been successfully processed by the bank.
expected_es: El cambio de divisas ha sido procesado con éxito por el banco.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form ('ha sido'), natural construction, agreement ('procesado'), preposition ('por'), and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: The present perfect passive voice uses 'haber' + 'sido' + past participle, which must agree with the subject.

prompt_en: Say: The inheritance would be distributed fairly by the lawyer, if there were no disputes.
expected_es: La herencia sería repartida equitativamente por el abogado, si no hubiera disputas.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form ('sería'), natural construction, agreement ('repartida'), preposition ('por'), and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: Use 'sería' for conditional passive voice, ensuring the participle agrees with the subject.

prompt_en: Say: It is essential that the public subsidy be managed transparently by the city council.
expected_es: Es esencial que la subvención pública sea gestionada con transparencia por el ayuntamiento.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form ('sea'), natural construction, agreement ('gestionada'), preposition ('por'), and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: For passive voice in the subjunctive, use the subjunctive form of 'ser' and ensure the past participle agrees with the subject.

prompt_en: Say: The broken street light was repaired by the municipal crew last night.
expected_es: La luminaria averiada fue reparada por el equipo municipal anoche.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form ('fue'), natural construction, agreement ('reparada'), preposition ('por'), and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: Use 'ser' in the preterite for passive voice, with the participle agreeing with the subject.

prompt_en: Say: The firewall is constantly updated by the IT department for maximum security.
expected_es: El cortafuegos es actualizado constantemente por el departamento de TI para máxima seguridad.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form ('es'), natural construction, agreement ('actualizado'), preposition ('por'), and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: Use 'ser' for present passive voice, ensuring the past participle agrees with the subject.

prompt_en: Say: All scholarship holders will be evaluated by their respective mentors at the end of the program.
expected_es: Todas las becarias serán evaluadas por sus respectivos mentores al finalizar el programa.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form ('serán'), natural construction, agreement ('evaluadas'), preposition ('por'), and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: For future passive voice, use 'serán' and ensure the past participle agrees in gender and number with the subject.

prompt_en: Say: The document's issuance had already been delayed several times by bureaucratic issues.
expected_es: La expedición del documento ya había sido retrasada varias veces por problemas burocráticos.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form ('había sido'), natural construction, agreement ('retrasada'), preposition ('por'), and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: The pluperfect passive voice uses 'haber' in the imperfect ('había') + 'sido' + past participle, agreeing with the subject.
